name: cohost-wp-dev
description: Local WordPress dev environment for the Cohost WP plugin. Boots WordPress + MySQL in Docker via @wordpress/env. The published plugin lives in ./cohost.

scripts.activate: wp-env run cli wp plugin activate cohost
scripts.flush: wp-env run cli wp rewrite flush
scripts.lint:php: docker run --rm -v "$PWD/cohost:/src" -w /src php:8.2-cli sh -c 'for f in cohost.php uninstall.php includes/*.php templates/*.php; do php -l "$f" || exit 1; done'
